message:
type: CLAIM
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Adding transformers parameter to encode() for pre-encoding text transformation

type: CLAIM
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Adding optional return_positions=True param to Encoding.encode() to track starting char position of each token

type: INTENT
files: tiktoken/core.py:encode()
summary: Adding transformers param (callable or list of callables) to encode() only, applied to text before special-token check; not touching encode_to_numpy/encode_batch/encode_with_unstable signatures unless needed

type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py:encode()
summary: Done editing encode() to add transformers param; only touched signature+docstring+one new block before allowed_special handling, should merge cleanly with return_positions if you add params/logic elsewhere in the same function

type: INTENT
files: tiktoken/core.py:encode()
summary: Adding return_positions bool kwarg to encode(); when True returns (tokens, positions) tuple via new private helper _encode_with_positions; only touches encode() signature/docstring + adds one new branch and two new private methods, should merge with your transformers param as long as we keep both kwargs in the signature

type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Done: added return_positions kwarg + two @overload decls on encode(), plus private _encode_with_positions/_encode_ordinary_with_positions helpers near end of class; no other methods touched, all existing tests pass
